\input mftmac
\BL
$\\{cmchar}\7"Lowercase thorn";$\par
$\2{beginchar}(\1{oct}\7"015",10u\SH +\\{serif\_fit}\SH ,\\{asc\_height}\SH ,%
\\{desc\_depth}\SH );$\par
$\2{italcorr}.5\\{x\_height}\SH \ast \\{slant}+\1{min}(.5\\{curve}\SH -.85u\SH
,-.1u\SH );$\par
$\\{adjust\_fit}(\\{serif\_fit}\SH ,0);$\par
$\2{pickup}\\{tiny}_{nib};\ \\{pos}_{1}(\\{stem}',0);\ \\{pos}_{2}(%
\\{stem},0);$\par
$\\{pos}_{0'}(\\{stem}',0);\ \\{pos}_{0}(\\{stem},0);\ z_{0l}=z_{0'l};\
x_{0'}=x_{1};\ x_{0}=x_{2};$\par
$\\{lft}\,x_{1l}=\1{hround}(2.5u-.5\\{stem}');\ \\{top}\,y_{1}=h;$\par
$\2{numeric}\\{edge};\ \\{edge}=\\{rt}\,x_{2r};$\par
$\2{pickup}\\{fine}_{nib};\ \\{pos}_{3}(\2{if}\\{hefty}\?:\\{thin\_join}%
\2{else}\?:\\{hair}\3{fi},180);$\par
$\\{pos}_{4}(\\{vair}',90);\ \\{pos}_{5}(\\{curve},0);\ \\{pos}_{6}(%
\\{vair},-90);$\par
$\\{rt}\,x_{3l}=\frac1/{3}[\\{rt}\,x_{2},\\{edge}];\ y_{3}=\frac1/{8}[\\{bar%
\_height},\\{x\_height}];$\par
$x_{4l}=w-.5(w-\\{serif\_fit})+.5u;\ \\{top}\,y_{4r}=\\{x\_height}+\\{oo};$\par
$\\{rt}\,x_{5r}=\1{hround}\1{min}(w-1.35u+.5\\{curve},w-.6u);\ y_{5}=.5\\{x%
\_height};$\par
$x_{6}=x_{3};\ \\{bot}\,y_{6r}=-\\{oo};$\par
$(x,y_{4r})=\\{whatever}[z_{3l},z_{4l}];\ x_{4r}:=%
\1{min}(x,.5[x_{5r},x_{4}]);$\par
$\2{filldraw}\\{stroke}_{z3e}\{\\{up}\}\8{...}\{\\{right}\}z_{4e}\AM \\{super%
\_arc}_{e}(4,5)$\par
\quad${}\AM z_{5e}\{\\{down}\}\8{...}\{5(x_{6}-x_{5}),y_{6}-y_{5}\}z_{6e};\ \9
bowl\par
$y_{0}=\1{ypart}(((\\{edge},h)\8{--}(\\{edge},0))\6{intersectionpoint}(z_{3l}%
\{\\{up}\}\8{...}\{\\{right}\}z_{4l}));$\par
$\2{pickup}\\{tiny}_{nib};\ \\{bot}\,y_{2}=-d;$\par
$\2{filldraw}\\{stroke}_{z1e}\8{--}z_{0'e}\8{--}z_{0e}\8{--}z_{2e};\ \9 stem%
\par
$\2{pickup}\\{crisp}_{nib};\ \\{pos}_{8}(\\{hair},0);\ \\{pos}_{7'}(%
\\{stem},0);$\par
$z_{7'}=z_{2};\ x_{8l}=x_{7'l};\ \\{bot}\,y_{8}=0;$\par
$\2{filldraw}\\{stroke}_{z7'e}\8{--}z_{8e};\ \9 point\par
$\2{if}\\{serifs}\?:\\{sloped\_serif}_{l}(1,0',a,\frac1/{3},\\{jut},\\{serif%
\_drop});\ \9 upper serif\par
\quad$\\{dish\_serif}(2,0,b,\frac1/{3},\\{jut},c,\frac1/{3},0);\3{fi}\9 lower
serif\par
$\\{penlabels}(0,1,2,3,4,5,6,8);\3{endchar};$\par
\BL
\BL
